tweets.text: Btw this doesn’t mean becoming a social media influencer and screaming about all the problems in government.  It means figuring out how your company doing the things it does best can help make the world a better place.  And inspiring other successful founders to do the same.

tweets.name: Michael Seibel
tweets.text: Some will say that this is silly.  You should focus on shareholder returns and leave making the world better to others.  My question is who are these “others” and do you trust them?

Private AI chat is the sandbox.

Slack is the workplace.

That distinction matters more than people think.
